provisions.content:
APPOINTMENT OF THE COMPETENT AUTHORITY
(INVESTMENT FIRMS REGULATION AND
INVESTMENT FIRMS DIRECTIVE)

[ L.S. 370.45.

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.45
REGOLAMENTI DWAR APPOINTMENT OF THE
COMPETENT AUTHORITY (INVESTMENT FIRMS
REGULATION AND INVESTMENT FIRMS
DIRECTIVE)*
23 ta’ Lulju, 2021
AVVIŻ LEGALI 309 tal-2021.

Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 229 tal-2022.
